assertions.expectation: Distinguishes between dev (Rapid) and prod (Stable) clusters in the checklists
assertions.reason: Both checklists clearly differentiate between dev and prod clusters, mentioning testing on dev clusters first and validating prod clusters separately

assertions.expectation: Recognizes Autopilot limitations (no node management, no SSH, mandatory resource requests)
assertions.reason: Response explicitly mentions no node pool management, automatic node upgrades by Autopilot, and mandatory resource requests as critical requirements

assertions.expectation: Includes API deprecation checks with kubectl commands
assertions.reason: Pre-upgrade checklist includes specific kubectl command for checking deprecated API usage: `kubectl get --raw /metrics | grep apiserver_request_total | grep deprecated`

assertions.expectation: Mentions mandatory resource requests as an Autopilot-specific concern
assertions.reason: Multiple mentions of mandatory resource requests, specifically noting 'Autopilot will reject pods without them' and calling it the '#1 Autopilot upgrade failure'

assertions.expectation: Pre-upgrade checklist includes workload readiness items (PDBs, bare pods, graceful shutdown)
assertions.reason: Pre-upgrade checklist includes PDBs configuration, no bare pods requirement, and termination grace period settings for both regular and Spot pods

assertions.expectation: Post-upgrade checklist includes version verification commands
assertions.reason: Post-upgrade checklist includes specific gcloud commands to verify cluster versions: `gcloud container clusters describe CLUSTER_NAME --region REGION --format="value(currentMasterVersion)"`

assertions.expectation: Post-upgrade checklist includes workload health validation
assertions.reason: Post-upgrade checklist has comprehensive workload health checks including deployments, pods status, StatefulSets, PVCs, and application smoke tests

assertions.expectation: Recommends testing on dev clusters before prod auto-upgrade
assertions.reason: Response explicitly mentions using dev clusters for validation, documenting lessons learned, and leveraging the Rapid→Stable channel progression for natural validation

assertions.expectation: Mentions that checking the GKE release schedule gives ~1 month best-case advance notice for new minor upgrades, beyond the 72h notification
assertions.reason: Response mentions 30-day advance notice but doesn't specifically reference checking the GKE release schedule or distinguish this from the 72h notification window
Both checklists include comprehensive observability sections with monitoring baselines, metrics collection, log aggregation, and performance validation

assertions.expectation: Does NOT proactively recommend node-level maintenance exclusions for Autopilot unless the customer explicitly asks for node upgrade control
assertions.reason: Response mentions maintenance exclusions only for control plane timing and specifically notes that Autopilot handles node upgrades automatically without customer control
